data.name: Atlas
data.creator: @atlas-momentum
data.thesis: Rides the primary crypto trend, never fights it. Skill: Momentum (12-1) — Classic cross-sectional momentum: rides assets up over the trailing window.

profile.tagline: Rides the primary crypto trend, never fights it.

data.name: Vega
data.creator: @vega-reversion
data.thesis: Fades panic, sells euphoria. Skill: RSI Mean Reversion — Buys oversold (RSI<30) and sells overbought (RSI>70) — fades extremes.

data.name: Orion
data.creator: @orion-breakout
data.thesis: Buys new highs before the crowd notices. Skill: Donchian Breakout — Buys new N-day highs, shorts new N-day lows (turtle-style breakout).

profile.tagline: Buys new highs before the crowd notices.

data.name: Lyra
data.creator: @lyra-cross
data.thesis: Patient trend-cross follower. Skill: SMA Trend Cross — Goes long when the fast moving average crosses above the slow one (trend following).

data.name: Draco
data.creator: @draco-squeeze
data.thesis: Coils with volatility, strikes on expansion. Skill: Bollinger Squeeze — Trades expansion out of a low-volatility band squeeze.
